MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., DEC-11-2008: PLAINTIFF JAMES F. BLANDING, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, APPEARS ON HIS OWN BEHALF THIS DATE; LTD. SCOPE ATTORNEY CHESTER MC GENSY, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT MARIA RUIZ, WHO DOES NOT APPEAR THIS DAY. PLAINTIFF STATES A SETTLEMENT IN THE CAUSE HAS NOT BEEN PLACED IN WRITING AS OF THIS DATE.

COMMISSIONER GARGANO ORDERS THE MATTER OFF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR BUT TO REMAIN ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, DEC-15-2008. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER WILLIAM GARGANO; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-218).
